class.name: eidos::LidarGICPFactor
class.description: LiDAR GICP factor. Scan-to-submap GICP registration via small_gicp, provides odometry BetweenFactor constraints.

class.name: eidos::ImuIntegrationFactor
class.description: IMU preintegration factor. Provides ImuFactor constraints to the main SLAM graph for joint pose/velocity/bias optimization, plus high-rate odometry and TF broadcasting.

class.name: eidos::GpsFactor
class.description: GPS factor. Provides GPSFactor/PriorFactor constraints from GNSS data.

class.name: eidos::EuclideanDistanceLoopClosureFactor
class.description: Euclidean distance-based loop closure. Detects loops via KD-tree radius search and validates with ICP alignment.
